full_text:
Huangfu Jianshou 皇甫堅壽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huangfu Jianshou (皇甫堅壽)was born in Anding. Friend of Dong Zhuo, he pleaded for his father’s life. Refused service. Huangfu Jianshou was affiliated with Dong Zhuo.
